channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Son of Pablo Escobar murder victim appointed Colombia's interior minister.
item.description: The incoming minister's father, Rodrigo Lara Bonilla, was justice minister when he was killed in Bogota in 1984 on orders from Pablo Escobar.

item.title: Iran live updates: Israel strikes Hezbollah targets in southern Lebanon.
item.description: A U.S. official said the U.S. and Iran agreed to halt attacks on Sunday.

item.title: Dangerous heat wave expected to affect large parts of the U.S. this week.
item.description: A heat wave will impact a large area of the U.S. this week, with high humidity making temperatures feel even hotter, according to the National Weather Service.

item.title: U.S. official says talks will resume after Iran threatens to withdraw.
item.description: Iran launched drone and missile attacks targeting Kuwait and Bahrain on Sunday, following earlier exchanges of attacks between the U.S. and Iran over the weekend.
